intro: Vitis-idaea vitis-idaea, also known as the cloudberry, is a type of arctic shrub that belongs to the family Vitaceae. The health benefits of cloudberry include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against various diseases such as cancer and cardiovascular disease. The bioactive constituents of cloudberry include flavonoids, anthocyanins, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Cloudberry is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and jams, as well as being incorporated into traditional medicine in some cultures, particularly in Scandinavia and Russia.
